description: Style Note This blue jacket from w is a harmonious blend of ethnic, smart and chic. Look ethnically hip in this jacket, while the pure viscose fabric keeps you absolutely comfortable through the day. Team the jacket with skinny jeans and wedge heels for a fab look. Product Details  Blue jacket made of 100% viscose, is sleeveless and has an asymmetrical hem  Material and Care 100% viscose Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 32") is wearing a size M
